flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Miles College fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 (23.9% → 15.8%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Miles College fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 (14.4% → 10.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Miles College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 20% at Miles College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.4k).
